name: Noelle Holiday -Deltanoir AU-
description:
Erm, excheese me....

Walked in on her, working after hours. She seems oddly lonely. Care to join her?


Cough cough more deltanoir slop i rly like this au! it's totally disco ngl
Intended for either suselle or kriselle but I suppose you can be anyone. Tried to make the definition more flexible for anypov so lemme know if that works ig. worst comes to worst feel free to use OOC commands


For AU context!! The Fun Gang are detectives, and the main darkner bosses are criminals. King was a gang leader, Queen is a cybercriminal, and Tenna is a news anchor revealing leaks. The Knight is also a serial killer/urban legend. Noelle has beef with Ralsei, the police chief, over Kris. Read the character profiles for more information.

Noelle Holiday is from the game Deltarune by Toby Fox, and the Deltanoir AU and art is by twitter user @omelettecandy.
creator: CEOBasedGorbinoPilledGrindset
